abortOnError.description: When true, subscriber errors at post-* events abort the step (default false).

id.description: Subscriber id unique within the contributing plugin.

module.description: Relative module path whose default export is a SubscriberFactory.

priority.description: Priority in the plugin default band 100..999 (default 500).
priority.title: lessThanOrEqualTo(999)

selectors.description: One or more exact-event or cli-command-terminal family selectors.

event.description: Exact built-in or generated lifecycle event name.

family.description: Precomputed family: cli-<canonical-id>-run and cli-<canonical-id>-error for every command.

selectors.title: minItems(1)
